justification: The issue describes a specific behavior inconsistency related to interpolation with missing values in a Series backed by pyarrow dtype, which is expected to be handled differently compared to numpy backend.
current_state_summary: The issue is open and has not been addressed. Related issues exist but do not directly address the current problem.

related_issues.title: pd.merge regression when doing a left-join with missing data on the right. Result has a Float64Index
BUG: Series with same index values, but in different orders, cannot be compared, but can be added
pd.crosstab, categorical data and missing instances
